---
name: QA testing
about: Use this as a checklist when doing manual quality assurance testing for a feature

---

## QA testing checklist

Consider testing changes / effects on these aspects, views, and flows: 

- [ ] Unauthenticated
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Different form elements
- [ ] Repeating sets
- [ ] Multi-page forms with review page
- [ ] Your Forms - cards
- [ ] Preview / Test
- [ ] Draft forms
- [ ] Published forms
- [ ] Closed forms
- [ ] Archived forms
- [ ] Data validation
- [ ] Error messages
- [ ] Saving progress
- [ ] Show-hide display rules
- [ ] Branching conditional logic
- [ ] Collaborative drafting
- [ ] Getting a copy of submission
- [ ] Translations (+spreadsheet)
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Publishing
- [ ] Responses
   - [ ] Email
   - [ ] HTML
   - [ ] CSV
   - [ ] JSON
   - [ ] API
   - [ ] Receipt
